notes: Clone working tree contains README/license only; no MCP server source or tool registration found.
Haskell app entry point and Cabal package reference external/local PMS packages; no concrete MCP tools/list or tool definitions are present in this clone to extract.
Python MCP SDK Server in src/mcp_server_openai/server.py uses @server.list_tools and @server.call_tool; one ask-openai tool.

metadata.name: ask-openai
metadata.description: Ask my assistant models a direct question

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Ask assistant

notes: NCP MCP server in src/server/mcp-server.ts registers ListToolsRequestSchema/CallToolRequestSchema. getToolDefinitions returns find plus either run (default find-and-run) or code (find-and-code) depending on enableCodeMode; switch handler supports find/run/code. Test dummy/mock MCP servers ignored.

metadata.name: find
metadata.description: Search or list MCP tools. Call as find() - no prefix needed. With description param: vector search tools by capability. Without description: list all available tools. Use pipe separator for multi-query ("gmail | slack").

description.description: Search query describing capability you need (e.g. "send email", "read file"). OMIT this parameter entirely to list all tools (do not pass "list all" or empty string). Use pipe separator for multi-query ("gmail | slack").

limit.description: Max results per page (default: 5 search, 20 list)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Search query describing capability you need (e.g. "send email", "read file"). OMIT this parameter entirely to list all tools (do not pass "list all" or empty string). Use pipe separator for multi-query ("gmail | slack").

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max results per page (default: 5 search, 20 list)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (default: 1)

parameters.name: confidence_threshold
parameters.description: Min confidence 0.0-1.0 (default: 0.35). Lower=more results, higher=precise.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Detail level: 0=names, 1=+descriptions, 2=+parameters (default: 2)

raw.title: ToolSearchResults
raw.description: Structured tool search results with metadata

metadata.name: run
metadata.description: Execute MCP tool (format: mcp:tool). Provides suggestions if not found.

parameters.description: Tool parameters

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: Tool to execute (format: mcp:tool)

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Tool parameters

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Preview without executing (default: false)

metadata.name: code
metadata.description: Execute TypeScript code with automatic tool discovery and parameter mapping.

code.description: TypeScript code. Use ncp.do("intent", { params }) for automatic tool discovery and param mapping.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: TypeScript code. Use ncp.do("intent", { params }) for automatic tool discovery and param mapping.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in ms (default: 30000, max: 300000)

notes: Two Python FastMCP demo servers under servers/calculator and servers/local; all @mcp.tool handlers recorded.

TypeScript McpServer in src/index.ts registers 13 tools exported from src/tools/*.ts with mcp.registerTool(name, config, init(...)). Zod schemas recorded as refs/raw, not expanded beyond located source refs.

metadata.name: readPortoneV2BackendCode
metadata.title: 포트원 V2 백엔드 코드 예제 읽기

metadata.name: readPortoneV2FrontendCode
metadata.title: 포트원 V2 프론트엔드 코드 예제 읽기

metadata.name: listSharedTestChannels
metadata.title: 포트원 공용 테스트 채널 목록 조회

metadata.name: getChannelsOfStore
metadata.title: 포트원 상점 내 채널 목록 조회

notes: Go mcp-go server adds Skopeo tools via AddTools(slices.Concat(...)) in pkg/mcp/mcp.go:28; tools defined with mcp.NewTool in pkg/mcp/skopeo.go.

metadata.name: valid_architectures
metadata.description: Displays the valid architecture values that the image information can contain

metadata.name: image_inspect
metadata.description: Displays low level information about a container image, an oci image or an oci archive

parameters.name: imageURL
parameters.description: The pull spec of an image or a path to an oci layout or an oci archive

metadata.name: image_inspect_architecture
metadata.description: Check if a particular architecture is supported by the given image.

parameters.name: imageURL
parameters.description: The pull spec of an image or a path to an oci layout or an oci archive

parameters.name: arch
parameters.description: The architecture to check for to see if an image manifest matching the architecture is present

metadata.name: image_inspect_architectures
metadata.description: Check if multiple architectures are supported by the given image. Check for most common architectures - amd64, arm64, ppc64le and s390x if not specified.

parameters.name: imageURL
parameters.description: The pull spec of an image or a path to an oci layout or an oci archive

parameters.name: architectures
parameters.description: The architectures to check for to see if an image manifest matching the architecture is present. Example: ["amd64", "arm64", "ppc64le", "s390x"]

notes: Python FastMCP server in src/mac_monitor/monitor.py registers three @mcp.tool process/system monitoring handlers.

metadata.name: get_resource_intensive_processes
metadata.description: Identify resource-intensive processes on macOS across CPU, memory, and network.

metadata.name: get_processes_by_category
metadata.description: Get all processes filtered by category (cpu, memory, network) with pagination and sorting support.

process_type.description: Type of processes to retrieve ('cpu', 'memory', or 'network')

page_size.description: Number of processes per page (default: 10, max: 100)

sort_by.description: Sort field - 'auto' (default metric), 'pid', 'command', or metric-specific fields

parameters.name: process_type
parameters.description: Type of processes to retrieve ('cpu', 'memory', or 'network')

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 1, default: 1)

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of processes per page (default: 10, max: 100)

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort field - 'auto' (default metric), 'pid', 'command', or metric-specific fields

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort direction - 'desc' (default) or 'asc'

metadata.name: get_system_overview
metadata.description: Get comprehensive system overview with aggregate statistics similar to Activity Monitor.

notes: TypeScript SDK Server in src/index.ts returns eight tools in ListToolsRequestSchema and dispatches them in CallToolRequestSchema to CoreTools/TimeTools. Additional call branches not present in tools/list were not extracted.

metadata.name: get_employee_details
metadata.description: Retrieve comprehensive employee information with flexible filtering options. Can fetch all employees, specific employees by IDs, or employees modified after a certain date.

employee_ids.description: Array of employee IDs to fetch details for specific employees

last_modified.description: ISO date string (DD-MM-YYYY HH:mm:ss) to fetch employees modified after this timestamp

employee_no.description: Single employee number to fetch detailed information for one employee

metadata.name: update_employee
metadata.description: Update employee information including personal details, work information, and other employee-related data.

employee_data.description: Employee data object containing fields to update

metadata.name: get_employee_history
metadata.description: Retrieve historical changes and updates made to employee records within a specified date range.

filter_on_effective_date.description: Filter flag for effective date (0 or 1)

metadata.name: download_personal_docs
metadata.description: Download employee personal documents such as profile pictures, ID proofs, or other uploaded documents.

employee_no.description: Employee number whose documents to download

for.description: Document type to download (e.g., profile_pic, id_proof)

metadata.name: get_position_master
metadata.description: Retrieve organizational position data including current positions, vacancies, and hiring needs.

need_to_hire.description: Flag for positions that need hiring (0 or 1)

employee_nos.description: List of employee numbers to filter positions

metadata.name: get_monthly_attendance
metadata.description: Retrieve detailed monthly attendance records for specified employees, including check-in/out times and attendance status.

emp_number_list.description: List of employee numbers to fetch attendance for

metadata.name: record_attendance_punches
metadata.description: Record employee attendance punches with timestamp and location details. Supports both check-in and check-out records.

attendance.description: Map of employee IDs to their attendance punch records

metadata.name: get_leave_balance
metadata.description: Retrieve current leave balances for specified employees across different leave types.

ignore_rounding.description: Whether to ignore rounding in balance calculation (0 or 1)

employee_nos.description: List of employee numbers to fetch leave balances for

leave_names.description: List of leave types to check balances for

notes: Laravel/Superconductor MCP server registers tools in routes/tools.php via MCP::tool and exposes the same names in VibesServer::$tools. Tool handler classes use #[ToolCall(...)] attributes and handle() methods.

metadata.name: tinker
metadata.description: Execute PHP code in the Laravel application context, like artisan tinker.

metadata.name: get-absolute-url
metadata.description: Get the absolute URL for a given relative path or named route. If no arguments are provided, you will get the absolute URL for "/"

metadata.name: application-info
metadata.description: Get comprehensive application information including PHP version, Laravel version, database engine, all installed packages with their versions, and all Eloquent models in the application.

metadata.name: read-log-entries
metadata.description: Read the last N log entries from the APPLICATION log, correctly handling multi-line PSR-3 formatted logs. Only works for log files

metadata.name: list-artisan-commands
metadata.description: List all available Artisan commands registered in this application.

metadata.name: browser-logs
metadata.description: Read the last N log entries from the BROWSER log. Very helpful for debugging the frontend and JS/Javascript

metadata.name: list-available-config-keys
metadata.description: List all available Laravel configuration keys (from config/*.php) in dot notation.

metadata.name: get-config
metadata.description: Get the value of a specific config variable using dot notation (e.g., "app.name", "database.default")

metadata.name: database-connections
metadata.description: List the configured database connection names for this application.

metadata.name: database-query
metadata.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the configured database.

metadata.name: database-schema
metadata.description: Read the database schema for this application, including table names, columns, data types, indexes, foreign keys, and more.

metadata.name: list-available-env-vars
metadata.description: List all available environment variable names from a given .env file (default .env).

metadata.name: last-error
metadata.description: Get details of the last error/exception created in this application on the backend. Use browser-log tool for browser errors.

metadata.name: list-routes
metadata.description: List all available routes defined in the application, including Folio routes if used

metadata.name: search-docs
metadata.description: Search for up-to-date version-specific documentation related to this project and its packages.
